stories.thread: Arrest of British Citizens in Turkey
stories.story: Nine British citizens were arrested in Turkey on Wednesday, suspected of trying to cross illegally into Syria. The Turkish military announced on its website that the arrests took place at the Turkey-Syria border.
key_facts: Nine British citizens were arrested in Turkey on Wednesday.
They were suspected of trying to cross illegally into Syria.
The arrests occurred at the Turkey-Syria border.
The Turkish military announced the arrests on its website.

stories.story: The group of nine British citizens included four children, three men, and two women. A Turkish official, speaking anonymously to CNN, stated that the oldest child was 10 or 11, and the youngest was born in 2013. All nine individuals were carrying British passports.
key_facts: The group consisted of nine individuals: four children, three men, and two women.
The oldest child was 10 or 11 years old.
The youngest child was born in 2013.
All nine individuals possessed British passports.
A Turkish official provided this information to CNN.

stories.thread: Context of Syria and Unknown Motives
stories.story: It was not stated why the group of British citizens was allegedly trying to enter Syria. Syria has been experiencing a roughly four-year war between Syrian government forces, Islamist extremist groups, and other rebels. ISIS is among the combatants in this war, having taken over parts of Syria and Iraq for its claimed Islamic caliphate, and is known to recruit Westerners.
key_facts: Syria has been torn by a roughly four-year war.
Combatants include Syrian government forces, Islamist extremist groups, and other rebels.
ISIS is among the combatants and is known to recruit Westerners.
explicit_unknowns: Why the group allegedly was trying to get into Syria.

stories.story: The British Foreign Office stated on Wednesday that it is aware of reports regarding the arrests and is seeking information about the incident from Turkish authorities. Separately, UK police charged a man with terror offenses following a trip to Turkey. It is not stated if this man is one of the nine British citizens arrested or if his charges are directly related to their specific incident.
key_facts: The British Foreign Office is aware of the arrest reports.
The Foreign Office is seeking information from Turkish authorities.
UK police charged a man with terror offenses.
The charge followed a trip to Turkey.
explicit_unknowns: If the man charged by UK police is one of the nine British citizens arrested.
If the man's charges are directly related to the specific incident of the nine arrests.
